problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
